raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California State Senator Dave Cortese introduced SB 429 to establish a public wildfire catastrophe model.",
    "The proposed wildfire catastrophe model aims to influence future city planning, including fire station and road evacuation placements.",
    "The model will inform California homeowners of the fire risks where they live, potentially affecting their insurance rates.",
    "The bill initiates a grant program to fund universities for the development of the wildfire catastrophe model.",
    "The wildfire catastrophe model is claimed to be transparent and science-driven.",
    "Investing in a university-led research center is intended to improve wildfire preparedness and planning.",
    "The model aims to provide communities a clearer understanding of wildfire risk."
  ]
}
```
